top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes
)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes
)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE milliseconds > 0
)
LIMIT 20;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;
